data.title: Stratus Properties Inc. Reports Year Ended December 31, 2025 Results
data.description: A residential and retail real estate company, Stratus Properties Inc. (NASDAQ: STRS), based in Austin, Texas, announced its year-end results for 2025. The company operates in Austin and other selected markets in Texas. A significant development in March 2026 was the board of directors unanimously approving a plan for complete liquidation and dissolution of Stratus, known as the Plan of Liquidation. This decision came after a strategic alternatives review.

data.title: CARNIVAL CORPORATION & PLC ACHIEVES RECORD FIRST QUARTER OPERATING RESULTS AND RECORD BOOKINGS
data.description: Carnival Corporation & plc has revealed PROPEL, a strategic initiative with ambitious objectives aiming to sustain earnings growth momentum until 2029. In addition, the company has launched a $2.5 billion share buyback program. The announcement was made in Miami on March 27, 2026. Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE/LSE: CCL; NYSE: CUK) disclosed these financial outcomes without mentioning specific details.

data.title: Polymarket and Parti.com Partner to Launch First Ever Livestreaming Prediction Marketplace
data.description: In a recent announcement, Polymarket and Parti.com have joined forces to introduce an innovative integration, marking the collaboration of the largest prediction market and the livestreaming platform. This groundbreaking partnership allows streamers and their audience to engage with real-time prediction markets seamlessly within the Parti.com platform. Beginning immediately, users can access, track, and participate in live markets without exiting the Parti.com interface. This integration enables content creators to explore the comprehensive range of markets offered through Polymarket’s infrastructure.

data.title: Tradeweb Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Tradeweb Markets Inc. (Nasdaq: TW), a prominent player in electronic trading globally, is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 on April 29, 2026, around 7:00 AM EDT. The company will also conduct an investor conference call featuring Billy Hult, the CEO, Sara Furber, the CFO, and Ashley Serrao, the Head of Treasury, FP&A, and IR. This call will cover the financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 and incorporate a question-and-answer session for participants.
